sourceMovie.title: Tower Heist
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Tower Heist works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Ocean's Eight
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Tower Heist clicked for you, Ocean's Eight (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Red Notice
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Tower Heist clicked for you, Red Notice (2021) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Tower Heist?
faq.answer: Try Ocean's Eight, Red Notice, The Other Guys—each shares DNA with Tower Heist while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Tower Heist?
faq.answer: Tower Heist (2011) is best described as Action, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Tower Heist worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
